title: HakaiPojaversmp
description: Just a crazy pvp pack which gives you custom things like netherite axe , diamond axe , netherite  sword , diamond sword , ender pearl and ender eye also totem is green and apple is grey
body:
⚔️ Custom SMP Resource Pack ⚔️

Upgrade your Minecraft SMP experience with a clean and competitive resource pack made for smooth PvP, better visibility, and an overall stylish look. Designed specially for multiplayer survival gameplay, this pack improves textures without changing the classic Minecraft feel.

✨ Features:
- Use 1.21.1 for best compatibility,for1.21.1+ use optifine
- Clean & optimized textures
- Smooth FPS-friendly design
- Better PvP visibility
- Custom swords, tools & armor
- Improved GUI and crosshair
- Stylish particles and effects
- Perfect for SMPs, PvP & survival gameplay
  
🎮 Works great for both casual players and sweaty PvPers. Whether you're grinding, fighting, or building with friends, this pack makes everything look cleaner and feel smoother.

📦 Version: [1.21+]

👑 Made by: [HakaiPojaver]

🔥 Download now and dominate your SMP in style!
